title: Master v0.5.4 Tester Small Update Auto Publish
notes:
Changes:
- Adds Auto Publish Tester Small Update button.
- Publishes JSON-only small update directly to GitHub.
- Uploads tester/latest-update.json.
- Uploads tester/updates/<version>.json.
- No EXE required.
- Small update payload marks appReplacement false, requiresExe false, keepsTesterUpdateTab true.
- Refuses to publish if shared database cannot be read or item count is 0.
- Writes Master history entry.
- Sends Discord alert if enabled.
